task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Informed Consent' group is positioned as the first question group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LimeSurvey survey structure sidebar or group list, 'Informed Consent' appears at the top as the first group.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Shopping Habits' group is positioned as the second question group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey structure sidebar or group list, 'Shopping Habits' appears immediately below 'Informed Consent' as the second group.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Demographics' group is positioned as the third question group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey structure sidebar or group list, 'Demographics' appears below 'Shopping Habits' as the third/last group.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'CONSENT1' question is configured as mandatory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the question settings for 'CONSENT1', the 'Mandatory' toggle is set to 'On'/'Yes', or a mandatory indicator (such as a red asterisk) is visible next to the question name in the survey structure.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'DEMO_INC' question is configured as optional.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the question settings for 'DEMO_INC', the 'Mandatory' toggle is set to 'Off'/'No', or there is no mandatory indicator (no red asterisk) next to the question name in the survey structure.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LimeSurvey web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected outcome into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are reflected in the actual LimeSurvey UI elements (menus, sidebars, toggles), not in a plain text file or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client to alter the survey structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of phpMyAdmin, sqlite3, or other database management tools being used to modify the survey records directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Consumer Shopping Habits 2025'. Group Names: 'Informed Consent', 'Shopping Habits', 'Demographics'. Question Codes: 'CONSENT1' (Consent Agreement), 'DEMO_INC' (Annual Household Income). The task is performed in the LimeSurvey web interface.
